nav.exitBrief: Get a quick read on your business

hero.eyebrow: For Israeli family-owned businesses. NIS 5–50M revenue.
hero.h1: Get the most out of your life's work.
hero.subhead: An Israeli sell-side advisor for family businesses built by people who have been on your side of the table.
hero.secondaryCta: Get a quick read on your business.

howItWorks.step1_body: A 90-minute conversation and a look at three years of financials. We tell you what a buyer will see, what will compress your multiple, and what will expand it.
howItWorks.step2_body: Named Israeli strategics, regional PE, and relevant cross-border acquirers. Every name is researched. No generic lists.
howItWorks.step3_body: Simultaneous outreach, managed information flow, competitive tension. The process creates the price, not the asking number.
howItWorks.step4_body: Term sheet, due diligence, SPA. We stay in the room until the wire clears.
howItWorks.cta: Talk to us about your business.

founders.h2: Built by people who have been on your side of the table.
founders.ben_bio: Ben brings deep operational experience from the Israeli technology and services sector. He has sat on the founder side of multiple transactions and built Gesher to run the process he wished he had.
founders.ofir_bio: Ofir has 40 years of Israeli M&A experience across industrial, distribution, and services verticals. He knows the buyers, the brokers, and the banks. He has seen every deal structure that works in the Israeli market and several that do not.

contact.subhead: Tell us where you are and we will tell you honestly whether we can help.
contact.label_stage: Where are you in the process?
contact.label_message: Anything else you want us to know
contact.success_body: We will be in touch within one business day.
contact.error: Something went wrong. Please try again or email us directly.

footer.address: [OB&H office address, Ben to paste from obhcpa.com]
footer.legal: Gesher Partners is not a licensed investment advisor. Nothing on this site constitutes investment advice or a solicitation to buy or sell any security.

exitBrief.h1: Get a quick read on your business.
exitBrief.subhead: Paste your company website. We read it, pull comparable Israeli transactions, and return a three-part brief: market context, value drivers, and an estimated valuation range.
exitBrief.intake_note: Financial figures sharpen the valuation range from [low] to [high] confidence. We never share them.
exitBrief.disclaimer: Strictly private. Built from public sources. Not an offer or a valuation opinion.
exitBrief.ofir_card_body: Book a 30-minute call with Ofir Ben Haim. We will walk through your specific number, your buyer list, and the two or three things that will move your multiple.
exitBrief.modal_title: Get your Exit Brief as a PDF.
exitBrief.modal_body: Enter your name and email. We will send the PDF directly to your inbox.

notFound.body: The page you are looking for does not exist. It may have moved, or the link may be wrong.

privacy.body: Privacy policy will be published before launch.

terms.body: Terms of use will be published before launch.
